name: editor4c: block markdown autoformat (## + space → h2) fires on the space
_note: Phase B — markdown block autoformat via onBeforeInput → dispatchIntent → cmdInputRule (src/commands/input-rules.ts blockRule). Cmd+A + Backspace collapses the doc to one bare editable block; typing '## ' makes the block's whole text the marker '##', and the trailing space triggers blockRule → converts the block to an <h2> and consumes the '## ' marker (not inserted). Then 'Sub' types into the new heading. Distinctive: the seed's single <h1> is gone (0) and exactly one <h2> named 'Sub' exists — proving the space-triggered block rule fired, not a literal insert (which would read '## Sub' in a non-heading block).
